creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Johnston from comment #2)
make -C /usr/src/ -j3 buildworld > /tmp/world.log && sudo make -C /usr/src/ installworld DESTDIR=/tmp/destdir >> /tmp/world.log

But actually exact commands don't matter as well. I just switched to releng/13.2 from releng/13.1 with my good old SRCCONF (which always worked flawlessly since creation), building system, trying to install, seeing failure, commenting related option, building again, seeing error on another file, and going again.
